title: Announcements
content:
Announcements

Faculty of Business and Administrative Sciences

Announcements

2024 - 2025 Summer Semester Single Course and Grade Enhancement Exams

25
						August

2025

Dear Students,

Applications for the 2024 - 2025 Summer Semester Single Course or Grade Enhancement Exam will be

done by September 5, 2025

until 17.00 p.m. To apply for the single course or grade enhancement exam students must fill in the "Single Course Exam Application Petition" or “Application Petition to Increase Grade Exam” available on the website and submit to the Faculty Secretariat in person.

The exams of the students whose single course or grade enhancement exam applications are accepted will be held on

. The students who are eligible to take single course or grade enhancement exam will be informed by e-mail, hence it is vital to check your e-mail boxes.

Single Course Exam Application Petition

Application Petition to Increase Grade Exam

Good luck.

en

tr
